name: Cutlass (SS-478)
events: 25 Apr 1945 USS Cutlass (Cdr. H.L. Jukes, USN) arrived at Newport, Rhode Island from Portsmouth, New Hampshire for torpedo trials.
28 Apr 1945 Having completed her torpedo trials, USS Cutlass (Cdr. H.L. Jukes, USN) arrived at New London, Connecticut.

22 May 1945 USS Cutlass (Cdr. H.L. Jukes, USN) departed New London for Key West, Florida. Part of the passage was made together with USS Roncador (Cdr. E.R. Crawford, USN) which was to proceed to Port Everglades, Florida. They were escorted by USS Scoter.
27 May 1945 USS Cutlass (Cdr. H.L. Jukes, USN) arrived at Key West, Florida.
29 May 1945 USS Cutlass (Cdr. H.L. Jukes, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
30 May 1945 USS Cutlass (Cdr. H.L. Jukes, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
31 May 1945 USS Cutlass (Cdr. H.L. Jukes, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
1 Jun 1945 USS Cutlass (Cdr. H.L. Jukes, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
3 Jun 1945 USS Cutlass (Cdr. H.L. Jukes, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
4 Jun 1945 USS Cutlass (Cdr. H.L. Jukes, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
5 Jun 1945 USS Cutlass (Cdr. H.L. Jukes, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
7 Jun 1945 USS Cutlass (Cdr. H.L. Jukes, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
8 Jun 1945 USS Cutlass (Cdr. H.L. Jukes, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
9 Jun 1945 USS Cutlass (Cdr. H.L. Jukes, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
11 Jun 1945 USS Cutlass (Cdr. H.L. Jukes, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
12 Jun 1945 USS Cutlass (Cdr. H.L. Jukes, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
13 Jun 1945 USS Cutlass (Cdr. H.L. Jukes, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
14 Jun 1945 USS Cutlass (Cdr. H.L. Jukes, USN) departed Key West, Florida for the Panama Canal Zone.
28 Jun 1945 USS Cutlass (Cdr. H.L. Jukes, USN) departed the Panama Canal Zone for Pearl Harbor.
17 Jul 1945 USS Cutlass (Cdr. H.L. Jukes) departed from Pearl Harbor for her 1st war patrol. She was ordered to patrol of the Kuril Islands.
21 Jul 1945 USS Cutlass (Cdr. H.L. Jukes) arrived at Midway for further training and some minor repairs
9 Aug 1945 USS Cutlass (Cdr. H.L. Jukes) departed from Midway for her patrol area of the Kurils.
27 Aug 1945 USS Cutlass (Cdr. H.L. Jukes) arrived at Midway. She departed from for Pearl Harbor the same day.
31 Aug 1945 USS Cutlass (Cdr. H.L. Jukes) ended her 1st war patrol at Pearl Harbor.
